# Consul 2.0.x

We are pleased to announce the following Consul updates.

## Release highlights

- **Support of IBM Passport Advantage Online (PAO) licenses**. The Consul agent now supports  has an extended Consul’s existing licensing and reporting functionality to support parsing and reporting with the IBM PAO license.Consul’s existing licensing and reporting functionality is extended to support parsing and reporting with the IBM PAO license <EnterpriseAlert inline/>


## Upgrading

For more detailed information, please refer to the [upgrade details page](/consul/docs/upgrade/version-specific) and the changelogs.

## Known issues

There are no known issues at this time. These release notes are updated as issues are discovered.

[Report issues on Github](https://github.com/hashicorp/consul/issues).

The changelogs for this major release version and any maintenance versions are listed below.
